exercises.title: Walk a sample tree
exercises.description: Print preorder, inorder, and postorder traversals for a small tree and compare the outputs.
exercises.expected_outcome: Inorder traversal of a BST should come out sorted.

exercises.title: Inspect a heap
exercises.description: Insert several values into a binary heap and observe how the smallest or largest value stays at the root.
exercises.expected_outcome: The root should always hold the current min or max depending on heap type.

exercises.title: Implement a BST
exercises.description: Write search, insert, and delete for a binary search tree and test the ordering invariant.
exercises.expected_outcome: Lookups should respect the BST ordering rule and deletes should preserve it.

exercises.title: Build a trie autocomplete
exercises.description: Store a word list in a trie and return completions for a typed prefix.
exercises.expected_outcome: Prefix queries should return only words that start with the prefix.

exercises.title: Implement AVL rotations
exercises.description: Add AVL insertion with single and double rotations, then verify the balance factor stays bounded.
exercises.expected_outcome: The tree should remain height-balanced after each insert.

exercises.title: Simulate B-tree splits
exercises.description: Model page splits and range scans for a small B-tree or B+ tree and compare behavior to a BST.
exercises.expected_outcome: Node splits should keep the tree shallow and preserve sorted range access.
